alkylation reagent: alkylated (4 μl 500 mM iodoacetamide, 45 min, dark)
alkylation concentration: alkylated (4 μl 500 mM iodoacetamide, 45 min, dark)
cleavage agent: 2 μg sequencing grade trypsin was added
collision energy: HCD-normalized collision energy was set to 27
enrichment method: we employed affinity purification of biotinylated Matr3
fractionation method: 50% of the sample was used for SCX fractionation
fragmentation method: acquiring higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) tandem mass spectrometry
instrument: analyzed on a benchtop Orbitrap Q Exactive Plus mass spectrometer
labeling: Desalted peptides were labeled with TMT6 reagents
